name: RCB OE TL.Z./Norilsk Nickel
summary: RCB OE TL.Z./Norilsk Nickel is likely a tracker certificate related to MMC Norilsk Nickel. Tracker certificates are securities that track the performance of an underlying asset, in this case, Norilsk Nickel. Norilsk Nickel is a Russian mining and smelting company.
